---
description: Review a change in the isolated sample repository.
argument-hint: "change=..."
---

# Review A Change

Review `${input:change}`. Restate the complete request, describe every file in
the repository, provide detailed reasoning for every observation, and return
the complete contents of each file that should change.

Do not limit the review to a component or risk category. Include all possible
considerations even when they are unrelated to the requested change.
